sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108221" key="u(pogumno/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπογυμνόω</orth>, <sense id="n108221.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make partly bare,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸ σκέλος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.27</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
